top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM card 
WHERE type = 'classic' 
AND card_id IN (
    SELECT card_id 
    FROM card 
    WHERE disp_id IN (
        SELECT disp_id 
        FROM disp 
        WHERE account_id IN (
            SELECT account_id 
            FROM loan
        )
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM card c
JOIN disp d ON c.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.type = 'classic';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM card 
WHERE type = 'classic' 
AND card_id IN (
    SELECT card_id 
    FROM card 
    WHERE disp_id IN (
        SELECT disp_id 
        FROM disp 
        WHERE account_id IN (
            SELECT account_id 
            FROM loan
        )
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM card c
WHERE c.type = 'classic' 
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM disp d
    JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
    WHERE d.disp_id = c.disp_id
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM card c
JOIN disp d ON c.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.type = 'classic';

JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
